name: Box Platform API
description: [Box Platform](https://developer.box.com) provides functionality to provide access to content stored within [Box](https://box.com). It provides endpoints for basic manipulation of files and folders, management of users within an enterprise, as well as more complex topics such as legal holds and retention policies.

capabilities.name: authorization
capabilities.description: Manage authorization — request access token, refresh access token, revoke access token. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.description: Manage files — copy file, update file, get file information. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: trashed_files
capabilities.description: Manage trashed files — restore file, get trashed file, permanently remove file. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: app_item_associations
capabilities.description: Manage app item associations — list file app item associations, list folder app item associations. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: downloads
capabilities.description: Manage downloads — download file. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: uploads
capabilities.description: Manage uploads — upload file, upload file version. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: uploads_chunked
capabilities.description: Manage uploads chunked — create upload session, create upload session for existing file, commit upload session. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: collaborations_list
capabilities.description: Manage collaborations list — list pending collaborations, list file collaborations, list folder collaborations. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: comments
capabilities.description: Manage comments — create comment, update comment, list file comments. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: tasks
capabilities.description: Manage tasks — create task, update task, list tasks on file. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: file_versions
capabilities.description: Manage file versions — promote file version, restore file version, list all file versions. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: metadata_instances_files
capabilities.description: Manage metadata instances files — create metadata instance on file, update metadata instance on file, list metadata instances on file. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
